channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Strong, Fudd help UConn blow out UCLA 85-51 in Final Four as Bueckers moves 1 win from elusive title
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Sarah Strong and Azzi Fudd didn’t even need much help from superstar Paige Bueckers to propel UConn into the national title game, leading the Huskies to a remarkably easy 85-51 victory over UCLA on Friday night in the Final Four of the women’s NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: South Carolina returns to the NCAA title game and gets a rematch of 2022 against Bueckers and UConn
item.description: The journey has been more challenging than usual, but Dawn Staley and defending national champion South Carolina are still getting the job done.
item.dc:creator: Fred Goodall, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NCAA women’s basketball: South Carolina, UConn advance to title game
item.description: Defending national champion South Carolina ripped Texas Friday before UConn routed UCLA to set up Sunday's NCAA women's basketball championship matchup.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Green scores 34 as Rockets snap Thunder's 11-game winning streak with 125-111 victory
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Jalen Green had 34 points, Alperen Sengun added 31 and the Houston Rockets snapped the Oklahoma City Thunder's 11-game winning streak with a 125-111 victory Friday night. Houston, which is second in the Western Conference, improved to 2-3 against the top-seeded Thunder with the win.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Detroit Pistons clinch first playoff spot since 2018-19 season with win over Raptors
item.description: For the first time since the 2018-2019 season, your Detroit Pistons are heading back to the NBA playoffs as they’ve locked in a top-six seed in the Eastern Conference.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Korda won't defend Match Play title on the weekend after a rough day for the world's top players
item.description: NORTH LAS VEGAS, Nev. (AP) — Nelly Korda, the world's top-ranked player, won't be around this weekend to defend her T-Mobile Match Play championship. She needed to defeat Ariya Jutanugarn, but lost 1-up Friday on the final day of round-robin play and failed to qualify for the round of 16.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Alex Ovechkin ties Wayne Gretzky's all-time NHL goal record
item.description: Alex Ovechkin is now one goal away from surpassing Wayne Gretzky as the NHL's all-time leading goal scorer. Ovechkin tied the "Great One" Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Defending national champion South Carolina returns to title game with 74-57 rout of Texas
item.description: Defending national champion South Carolina left no doubt it would return to the title game, getting 14 points from Te-Hina Paopao and overwhelming Texas 74-57 in the Final Four of the women’s NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Alanis Thames, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Brian Harman builds 4-shot lead at Texas Open
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Brian Harman found the range with his iron shots and converted eight birdie putts Friday, none outside 12 feet, for a 6-under 66 that gave him a four-shot lead over Keith Mitchell going into the weekend at the Valero Texas Open.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Gretzky witnesses Ovechkin moving 1 goal back of his record as he joins the chase in person
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Wayne Gretzky witnessed Alex Ovechkin scoring his 893rd goal to move one back of tying his NHL record, as the Canadian great made his first in-person appearance during this chase.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Creighton scores in portal with ex-Big Ten freshman of year Freeman and high-scoring Graves
item.description: Former Iowa forward Owen Freeman, the 2023-24 Big Ten freshman of the year, has signed with Creighton. The 6-foot-10 Freeman averaged 16.7 points and 6.7 rebounds in 19 starts this season for the Hawkeyes before missing the final two months following finger surgery.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WNBA star Elena Delle Donne retires after 11 seasons and the 2019 championship
item.description: Elena Delle Donne is officially retiring from professional basketball after not playing last year and dealing with injuries and illnesses throughout her entire career.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA fines Grizzlies' Ja Morant $75,000 for continued finger-gun gestures, after warning him to stop
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Ja Morant showed off an imaginary gun. The NBA hit back with a real fine. A day after Morant again used his aiming-a-gun gesture to celebrate making 3-pointers, the Grizzlies’ star was fined $75,000 by the league Friday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MASTERS '25: Scottie Scheffler the latest in a long line who learned from Randy Smith
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — One was a young teenager in Ohio whose family was moving to Texas. Another was a college kid at Kansas looking for help with his swing. And then there was Scottie Scheffler, a 6-year-old in New Jersey whose mother had taken a C-suite job at a Dallas law firm.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CC Sabathia reveals what his Baseball Hall of Fame speech theme will be
item.description: CC Sabathia may not be done writing his Baseball Hall of Fame speech, but he knows the main theme he wants to get across. And he revealed that to Fox News Digital.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kings score three times in third period to beat Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club's playoff chances are growing slimmer with each loss, and it looks like it's going to take a miraculous turn of events to get in now.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Women's Final Four teams touch the court for shootarounds ahead of tournament
item.description: During press conferences, the teams expressed excitement and an eagerness to fight for their spot in the championship.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jazz clinch worst record in franchise history
item.description: CHARLOTTE (ABC4 Sports) - It's official. The 2024-25 Utah Jazz will have the worst record in franchise history. Miles Bridges had 26 points, 10 rebounds and eight assists and the Charlotte Hornets defeated the Jazz 110-106 on Monday night hand Utah is 60th loss of the season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes lose to Butler in College Basktball Crown
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - The Runnin' Utes got one more opportunity to play this season, but lost to Butler in the inaugural College Basketball Crown tournament in Las Vegas Monday, 86-84. Keanu Dawes, who entered the transfer portal last week, led the Utes with 19 points and 11 rebounds.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kerfoot has a goal and 2 assists in Utah's 5-2 victory over the Blackhawks
item.description: Alexander Kerfoot had a goal and two assists and Karel Vejmelka stopped 27 shots to help the Utah Hockey Club beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-2 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Diamondbacks rally for 8 runs in the eighth to beat the Cubs 10-6, split 4-game series
item.description: Lourdes Gurriel Jr. hit a game-tying, two-run homer, Josh Naylor had the go-ahead RBI double and the Arizona Diamondbacks used an eight-run eighth inning to rally past the Chicago Cubs 10-6 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Houston's defense carries Cougars into 7th Final Four with 69-50 March Madness win over Tennessee
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Houston’s relentless, harassing defense had Tennessee's shooters dancing around. Now, the Cougars are two-stepping it back to Texas. L.J.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Defending champion South Carolina returns to Final Four of women's NCAA Tournament
item.description: Chloe Kitts scored 14 points and defending national champion South Carolina reached the Final Four of the women's NCAA Tournament for a fifth straight year, beating Duke 54-50 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: USC shakes off JuJu Watkins' absence and beats Kansas State 67-61 in March Madness
item.description: Kennedy Smith stepped into the void left by injured star JuJu Watkins, scoring 19 points to help Southern California hold off Kansas State 67-61 in the Sweet 16 of the women's NCAA Tournament on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kyle Tucker homers as the Cubs hold off the Diamondbacks for a 4-3 win
item.description: Kyle Tucker hit his first home run with the Chicago Cubs, leading his new team to a 4-3 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Luge officials predict 2026 Olympic sliding races will be in Italy, a good sign for Milan-Cortina
item.description: Next year's Olympic sliding races will be in Italy after all, international luge officials predicted Saturday in another ringing endorsement of the newly rebuilt track in Cortina d'Ampezzo.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5
